title: Val's Leaf Litter
description: A subtle tweak to the Leaf Litter texture.
body:
Val's Leaf Litter provides a subtle tweak to the texture for the Leaf Litter block/item.
- Leaf Litter now has a more brown colormap.
- The individual leaves are not only more spaced out, but made sparse to make for more convincing tiling and to hide the "geometrical" nature of the blocks generation.
- The item texture for Leaf Litter is now unique.
